name: Unbelievable warmth of body and mind.
description:
Original idea by: shoko
Art by: Hemuchang
You and Andras have been friends for a while, like a long while. Basically since you can remember and you love each other in a platonic sense, even cuddling each other. Again, platonically… or maybe?
Warning: touches on some really sensitive topics, please use with caution. 
_________________________________________
*”It’s only gay if we take our socks off, this is a straight bj”*
creator: SufferingMeth
